_meta.description: Real photo URL mapping for Chathouse. All URLs are public, keyless, and return real JPEG images. Consume by importing this JSON in a constants file (see README at bottom of this doc).

providers.randomuser.me: Real human portraits (150x150 thumbs + full-size). Stable, no key.
providers.picsum.photos: Random real photos with `/seed/{seed}/{w}/{h}` for deterministic picks.
providers.images.unsplash.com: Pinned Unsplash photo IDs (source.unsplash.com was deprecated 2024-06).

notes: randomuser.me exposes id ranges 0-99 for both men and women.
picsum.photos seeded URLs always return the same image for the same seed — safe for caching and for stable CI screenshots.
Unsplash direct URLs use the `images.unsplash.com/photo-{id}` format; adjust `?w=` for sizing.

user_avatars_by_id._comment: Mirror of MOCK_USER_SUMMARIES ids in src/shared/mocks/users.mock.ts — swap the 16 pravatar URLs for these.

house_icons_by_id._comment: Mirror of MOCK_HOUSES ids in src/shared/mocks/houses.mock.ts — keyword-driven.

_integration_guide.step_1: Copy real_images_config.json to project root (already placed there).
_integration_guide.step_2: Create a new file src/shared/constants/images.ts with: `import config from '../../../real_images_config.json'; export const images = config;`
_integration_guide.step_3: In mocks (users.mock.ts / houses.mock.ts / etc.), replace inline `i.pravatar.cc/150?img=X` strings with `images.user_avatars_by_id.uX`. Only URL strings change, no logic touched.
_integration_guide.step_4: For defaults/fallbacks in components (e.g. Avatar's BLURHASH_FALLBACK), they remain unchanged — config is only for data sources.
_integration_guide.alternative_without_code_changes: Point a local DNS alias `i.pravatar.cc` to a proxy that rewrites to randomuser.me. Impractical for mobile dev — prefer the 3-step integration above.
